title: iochroma schjellerupii
intro: Iochroma schjellerupii, also known as the purple-flowered iochroma, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iochroma schjellerupii include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and alleviate congestion. Iochroma schjellerupii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
